links.title: 🔵  APRI STORICO
links.tooltip: Consulta lo storico persistente del paziente monitorato

panels.description: Angolo assoluto corrente del busto sul piano avanti/indietro.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Pitch

panels.description: Angolo assoluto corrente del busto sul piano laterale.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Roll

panels.description: Differenza corrente tra il pitch assoluto e il riferimento di calibrazione.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Dev. Pitch

panels.description: Differenza corrente tra il roll assoluto e il riferimento di calibrazione.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Dev. Roll

panels.description: Tempo consecutivo trascorso oltre la soglia di inclinazione avanti/indietro.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_duration_seconds" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Durata P

panels.description: Tempo consecutivo trascorso oltre la soglia di inclinazione laterale.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deviation_duration_seconds" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Durata R

panels.description: Stato del flusso live. La maglia e considerata disconnessa dopo 10 secondi senza dati posturali.

targets.query:
import "array"
samples = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: "connessione", _value: 1}))
baseline = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _field: "connessione", _value: 0}])
union(tables: [baseline, samples]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value")

panels.title: Maglia

panels.description: Livello di carica più recente trasmesso dalla smart shirt.

targets.query:
live = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_status" and r._field == "state_of_charge" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if exists live._value then float(v: r._value) else -1.0}))

panels.title: Batteria

panels.description: Valore pitch visualizzato e acquisito nel momento in cui è stato premuto CALIBRA.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "reference_pitch_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Calibrazione · Pitch

panels.description: Valore roll visualizzato e acquisito nel momento in cui è stato premuto CALIBRA.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "reference_roll_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Calibrazione · Roll

panels.description: Apre la procedura protetta per sostituire lo zero posturale.

options.content:
Conferma calibrazione

Paziente: ${patient_id}

Attenzione

Sono stati acquisiti i valori di pitch e roll presenti al momento del clic su CALIBRA. Confermando, questi valori sostituiranno lo zero posturale corrente.

panels.title: Calibrazione

panels.description: Evoluzione dell'inclinazione avanti/indietro nel periodo selezionato.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> set(key: "_field", value: "Pitch")

import "array"
reference = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "reference_pitch_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
array.from(rows: [{_time: v.timeRangeStart, _value: float(v: reference._value), _field: "Calibrazione Pitch"}, {_time: v.timeRangeStop, _value: float(v: reference._value), _field: "Calibrazione Pitch"}])

panels.title: Andamento inclinazione avanti/indietro

panels.description: Evoluzione dell'inclinazione laterale nel periodo selezionato.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> set(key: "_field", value: "Roll")

import "array"
reference = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "reference_roll_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
array.from(rows: [{_time: v.timeRangeStart, _value: float(v: reference._value), _field: "Calibrazione Roll"}, {_time: v.timeRangeStop, _value: float(v: reference._value), _field: "Calibrazione Roll"}])

panels.title: Andamento inclinazione laterale

panels.description: Ultimi eventi posturali rilevati per il paziente selezionato.

targets.query:
import "strings"
base = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}")
active = base |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "active") |> rename(columns: {_value: "active"}) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "code", "severity", "active"])
messages = base |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "message") |> rename(columns: {_value: "message"}) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "code", "severity", "message"])
join(tables: {active: active, messages: messages}, on: ["_time", "code", "severity"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with alert_name: if r.code == "POSTURE_MARKED_DEVIATION" then "Deviazione marcata" else if r.code == "POSTURE_PROLONGED_DEVIATION" then "Deviazione prolungata" else if r.code == "POSTURE_OK" then "Postura regolare" else if r.code == "DATA_STREAM_STALE" then "Flusso dati interrotto" else if r.code == "DATA_STREAM_RESTORED" then "Flusso dati ripristinato" else if r.code == "BATTERY_CRITICAL" then "Batteria critica" else if r.code == "BATTERY_LOW" then "Batteria bassa" else if r.code == "BATTERY_RECOVERED" then "Batteria ripristinata" else if r.code == "ACC_SEQUENCE_GAP" then "Pacchetti mancanti" else if r.code == "DATA_LOSS" then "Perdita dati maglia" else "Errore elaborazione", message: if strings.strlen(v: r.message) > 55 then strings.substring(v: r.message, start: 0, end: 55) + "…" else r.message})) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "alert_name", "active", "message"]) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 30)

panels.title: Alert recenti

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "posture", start: -30d)
